name: everything-university
description: Multi-skill university operations plugin. The first implemented branch is Act as a student: collect LMS, timetable, announcement, lecture-material, transcript, slide-gap, writing-style, notes-preference, and feedback information into separated memories for later academic execution.

interface.longDescription: Everything University coordinates focused Skills that collect and maintain university information from LMS portals, timetable sources, announcements, recordings, transcripts, slide/transcript gaps, user writing samples, notes preferences, and tutor feedback. It keeps memories separated by source and downstream use instead of writing one monolithic memory file.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Everything University to collect and organize my current university course context.
